mapper.insert: insert into ndt_dicom_object_relation (task_id, source_sop_instance_uid, related_sop_instance_uid, related_type, related_series_instance_uid, orthanc_instance_id, evaluation_id, create_time) values (#{taskId}, #{sourceSopInstanceUid}, #{relatedSopInstanceUid}, #{relatedType}, #{relatedSeriesInstanceUid}, #{orthancInstanceId}, #{evaluationId}, sysdate())
